description_long: This is a pendant lamp with a wide, shallow, dome-shaped metal shade suspended from a long, thin cord or rod. The shade has a slightly textured, matte finish in a deep blue-green color, giving it a utilitarian yet stylish appearance. The top of the shade tapers smoothly into the cord attachment, which is centrally positioned for balanced hanging. The lamp's design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing function over ornamentation. The underside of the shade is not visible, but it is likely open to allow light to be cast downward. This type of lamp is commonly used in urban environments such as cafes, lofts, garages, or industrial-style interiors.
description: A matte blue-green pendant lamp with a wide, shallow dome shade and a long, thin suspension cord. Its minimal, industrial design is functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view of the pendant lamp showing the full dome-shaped shade and the central suspension cord.
description_view_1: Side view of the lamp, nearly identical to the front, with the dome shade and cord visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the lamp, showing the same dome shape and cord, with no visible differences from the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the dome shade and cord, consistent with other views.
